div.div: No glossary terms yet — generation runs automatically once the AI finishes building your document outline. Click Refresh to retry.

div.class: d-none position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center rfp-loading-overlay

div.p: This usually takes 30–90 seconds

t.t-value: { 'draft': (1, 'Gather requirements'), 'initialized': (1, 'Gather requirements'), 'info_gathered': (1, 'Gather requirements'), 'practices_refined': (1, 'Gather requirements'), 'specifications_gathered': (1, 'Gather requirements'), 'practices_gap_gathered': (1, 'Gather requirements'), 'sections_generated': (2, 'Structure the RFP'), 'generating_content': (3, 'Drafting content'), 'generating_images': (3, 'Generating images'), 'content_generated': (3, 'Awaiting review'), 'images_generated': (3, 'Awaiting review'), 'document_locked': (3, 'Locked'), 'completed': (3, 'Completed'), 'completed_with_errors': (3, 'Completed'), }

{ 'draft': 'Not started — launch when ready', 'initialized': 'Setup complete · begin the AI interview', 'info_gathered': 'Interview in progress', 'practices_refined': 'Best practices refined', 'specifications_gathered': 'Specifications gathered', 'practices_gap_gathered': 'Gap analysis complete', 'sections_generated': 'Structure ready · generation will start', 'generating_content': 'AI drafting sections', 'generating_images': 'AI generating architecture images', 'content_generated': 'Content generated · sections ready to review', 'images_generated': 'All content ready · review and lock', 'document_locked': 'Document locked · awaiting publish', 'completed': 'Published to vendors', 'completed_with_errors': 'Published with warnings', }

projects.filtered(lambda p: p.current_stage not in ('draft', 'completed', 'completed_with_errors')).sorted(lambda p: (attention_order.get(p.current_stage, 9), -(p.write_date.timestamp() if p.write_date else 0)))[:3]

div.p: active projects · awaiting your review before publish · drafts .

div.style: background: var(--rfp-paper); border: 1px solid var(--rfp-ink-100); border-radius: var(--rfp-r-lg); padding: 64px 32px; text-align: center; margin-top: 32px;
div.p: Start your first AI-powered RFP project and let our intelligent system guide you from concept to completion.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 12px;

span.style: font-size: 11px; color: var(--rfp-ink-500); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .1em;

t.t-value: '/rfp/edit/%d' % fp.id if _is_review else ('/rfp/processing/%d' % fp.id if _is_generating else '/rfp/interface/%d' % fp.id)

input.t-attf-placeholder: Search #{len(projects)} project#{'s' if len(projects) != 1 else ''} by name or description…

span.style: font-size: 11px; color: var(--rfp-ink-300); padding: 2px 6px; border: 1px solid var(--rfp-ink-100); border-radius: 4px;

div.style: position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center;

svg.style: position: absolute; left: 10px; pointer-events: none; color: var(--rfp-ink-500);

t.t-value: '/rfp/edit/%d' % project.id if _p_review else ('/rfp/processing/%d' % project.id if _p_generating else '/rfp/interface/%d' % project.id)

tr.t-att-data-status: project.current_stage in ('completed', 'completed_with_errors', 'document_locked') and 'completed' or project.current_stage == 'draft' and 'draft' or 'in_progress'

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 14px 20px; border-top: 1px solid var(--rfp-ink-100); font-size: 15px; color: var(--rfp-ink-500);
margin-top: 24px; background: var(--rfp-paper); border: 1px solid var(--rfp-ink-100); border-radius: var(--rfp-r-lg); padding: 32px; text-align: center; color: var(--rfp-ink-500);
div.p: No projects match your search or filter criteria

div.class: mx-auto mb-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle

div.p: This will create a copy and use AI to pre-fill answers from your existing project. This may take 1-2 minutes.

input.placeholder: Enter name for the new project

div.class: mx-auto mb-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle

div.p: This action cannot be undone. All data will be permanently removed.
Describe a vision from scratch, or upload an existing document. Our AI will analyze the context and generate a tailored interview.

label.style: display: block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--rfp-ink-500); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .08em; margin-bottom: 6px;

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; margin-top: 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rfp-ink-100);

label.style: display: block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--rfp-ink-500); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .08em; margin-bottom: 6px;

div.label: Concept summary *

textarea.name: description
textarea.placeholder: Describe your goals, constraints, and high-level requirements. The AI will use this to generate the interview questions.

div.div: Aim for 2–4 sentences. You'll refine this in the AI interview.

label.style: display: block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--rfp-ink-500); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .08em; margin-bottom: 6px;

div.style: border: 2px dashed var(--rfp-ink-100); border-radius: var(--rfp-r-md); padding: 32px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; background: var(--rfp-ink-050); min-height: 160px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: border-color var(--rfp-t-fast), background var(--rfp-t-fast);
div.p: Drop files here or click to browse
PDF or DOCX files (max 50 MB total)

div.style: margin-top: 12px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;
display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 18px; padding: 14px 32px; background: var(--rfp-ink-050); font-size: 15px; color: var(--rfp-ink-500); border-top: 1px solid var(--rfp-ink-100);

div.class: mb-4 p-4 bg-white rounded shadow-sm rfp-input-group position-relative rfp-hover-card

label.class: form-label fw-bold mb-0 text-dark flex-grow-1 me-3 text-wrap d-flex align-items-center

div.class: mb-3 px-3 py-2 bg-light border-start border-3 border-info bg-opacity-50 text-muted rounded-end

t.t-value: input_field.data_type == 'phone' or (input_field.field_key and ('phone' in input_field.field_key.lower() or 'mobile' in input_field.field_key.lower()))

input.title: Please enter a valid email address (e.g., name@domain.com)

t.t-if: isinstance(o, dict) and o.get('group') and o.get('group') not in groups

t.t-value: opt['value'] if isinstance(opt, dict) else opt
opt['label'] if isinstance(opt, dict) else opt
opt['value'] if isinstance(opt, dict) else opt
opt['label'] if isinstance(opt, dict) else opt
opt['value'] if isinstance(opt, dict) else opt
opt['label'] if isinstance(opt, dict) else opt

input.t-att-required: 'required' if (not input_field.depends_on or input_field.depends_on == '{}') else False

small.class: d-flex align-items-center mb-2 text-uppercase fw-bold text-muted

div.class: btn-suggestion p-3 rounded-3 position-relative d-flex align-items-start gap-3 shadow-sm

i.class: fa fa-quote-left text-black-50 opacity-50 mt-1 flex-shrink-0

div.style: border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #f0c040; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fffcf0, #fff8e1); padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #90c0f0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0f7ff, #e8f1fc); padding: 1rem 1.25rem;

t.t-value: len(rfp_project.form_input_ids.filtered(lambda i: i.user_value or i.is_irrelevant)) + len(rfp_project.practice_input_ids.filtered(lambda i: i.user_value or i.is_irrelevant))

div.style: display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap;

div.div: These were extracted automatically. You can undo any to re-answer manually.

a.style: font-size: 15px; color: var(--rfp-gold-600); text-decoration: none; font-family: var(--rfp-font-mono); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .08em;

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--rfp-ink-100); gap: 10px;
font-size: 11px; color: var(--rfp-ink-500); font-family: var(--rfp-font-mono); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .08em;
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 6px;

div.p: The AI service is experiencing high traffic. Please wait 30 seconds before retrying.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 6px;

div.p: Reference:

div.style: padding: 14px 20px; margin-bottom: 16px; background: var(--rfp-info-bg); border-color: var(--rfp-info); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
div.div:
questions
— please answer below so the AI can continue its analysis.

t.t-elif: not questions_to_answer and ai_status != 'rate_limit' and not is_generating

div.style: width: 72px; height: 72px; margin: 0 auto 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--rfp-success-bg); color: var(--rfp-success); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 28px;

div.p: All current questions have been answered.
The AI will now analyze your responses and determine if more details are needed.

div.style: width: 96px; height: 96px; margin: 0 auto 28px; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; background: conic-gradient(var(--rfp-gold) 0deg, var(--rfp-ink-100) 0deg 360deg);
position: absolute; inset: 10px; background: var(--rfp-canvas); border-radius: 50%;

font-family: var(--rfp-font-mono); font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .12em; color: var(--rfp-ink-500); margin-bottom: 6px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px;

span.style: display: inline-block; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--rfp-gold);

div.p: This usually takes 3–5 minutes. Feel free to close this tab — we'll email you when it's ready.

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: 15px;

li.style: display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; padding: 8px 0; font-size: 13px; border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--rfp-ink-100);
display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; padding: 8px 0; font-size: 13px; border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--rfp-ink-100);
display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; padding: 8px 0; font-size: 13px; border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--rfp-ink-100);
display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; padding: 8px 0; font-size: 13px; border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--rfp-ink-100);
display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; padding: 8px 0; font-size: 13px; border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--rfp-ink-100);
display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; padding: 8px 0; font-size: 13px;

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; margin-top: 24px;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;
margin-top: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; font-size: var(--rfp-fs-sm); color: var(--rfp-ink-500);
display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center;

div.class: card-header bg-white d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center py-3

div.p: No evaluation criteria yet. Generate criteria based on your project requirements.

div.t-att-class: 'alert-success' if eval_total_weight == 100 else ('alert-danger' if eval_total_weight > 100 else 'alert-warning')

div.style: background:var(--rfp-white); border-radius:var(--rfp-radius); box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05); overflow:hidden;

div.t-attf-style: background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--rfp-dark) 0%, #16213E 100%); padding:1rem 1.5rem; color:white; position:relative; overflow:hidden; #{'border-bottom:3px solid #dc3545;' if c.is_must_have else 'border-bottom:3px solid var(--rfp-gold);'}

div.style: position:absolute; top:-50%; right:-20%; width:50%; height:200%; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(201,162,39,0.1) 0%, transparent 60%); pointer-events:none;

width:46px; height:46px; border-radius:50%; border:2.5px solid rgba(201,162,39,0.5); background:rgba(201,162,39,0.12); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-weight:800; font-size:1rem; color:var(--rfp-gold); flex-shrink:0;

input.style: background:transparent; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color:white; font-size:1.1rem; padding:0.35rem 0.75rem; border-radius:8px;

span.t-attf-class: badge bg-{{ 'primary' if c.category == 'technical' else ('success' if c.category == 'commercial' else ('info' if c.category == 'experience' else ('warning' if c.category == 'compliance' else 'secondary'))) }}

textarea.placeholder: What constitutes high, medium, and low scores...

i.class: fa fa-spinner fa-spin fa-2x text-rfp-gold mb-3

div.p: Criteria interview is in progress.

div.style: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: var(--rfp-font-mono); font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .12em; color: var(--rfp-ink-500); margin-bottom: 6px;
display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; font-size: 11px; color: var(--rfp-ink-500);

input.class: form-control fw-bold border-0 bg-transparent section-title-input flex-grow-1

div.class: position-absolute top-0 end-0 p-1 d-flex gap-1

span.style: font-size: 10px; display: block; color: var(--rfp-ink-300); margin-top: 2px;

t.div: Edit history will appear here as you work.

div.style: background: var(--rfp-paper); border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 10px; font-size: 15px; color: var(--rfp-ink-500); border: 1px solid var(--rfp-ink-100);

div.div: "Rewrite paragraph 3 in a more formal tone…"

div.style: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-top: 8px;

li.style: display: flex; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 0; color: var(--rfp-ink-300);

input.class: form-control fw-bold border-0 bg-transparent section-title-input flex-grow-1

div.class: mx-auto mb-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle

div.p: This will create a copy and use AI to pre-fill answers from your existing project. This may take 1-2 minutes.

input.placeholder: Enter name for the new project

div.p: Locking the document will prevent further edits. you can unlock it later but it is better to finish everything before locking.
This action cannot be undone.
Describe how you want to modify the content:

textarea.placeholder: E.g., Make it more formal, add bullet points, focus on security aspects...

div.p: Download your RFP export:

The download link will no longer be accessible.
Existing proposals will be preserved.

div.class: mx-auto mb-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle

div.style: display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap;

div.p: This is exactly what vendors will receive. Review carefully — content is read-only.

div.style: max-width: 780px; margin: 0 auto; background: var(--rfp-paper); box-shadow: var(--rfp-sh-md); padding: 56px 72px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: var(--rfp-font-serif);
text-align: center; padding-bottom: 24px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--rfp-gold); margin-bottom: 40px;
font-family: var(--rfp-font-mono); font-size: 11px; color: var(--rfp-gold-600); letter-spacing: .15em; text-transform: uppercase;

h1.style: font-family: var(--rfp-font-serif); font-size: 32px; margin: 12px 0 4px; color: var(--rfp-ink);

div.style: font-family: var(--rfp-font-mono); font-size: 11px; color: var(--rfp-gold-600); letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px;

h2.style: font-family: var(--rfp-font-serif); font-size: 22px; color: var(--rfp-ink); margin-bottom: 16px; padding-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rfp-ink-100);

div.style: font-family: var(--rfp-font-serif); font-size: 15px; color: var(--rfp-ink); line-height: 1.7;

img.style: max-width: 100%; max-height: 440px; border: 1px solid var(--rfp-ink-100); border-radius: var(--rfp-r-md); box-shadow: var(--rfp-sh-xs);

figcaption.style: margin-top: 8px; font-family: var(--rfp-font-sans); font-size: 15px; color: var(--rfp-ink-500); font-style: italic;

div.style: margin-top: 48px; padding-top: 24px; border-top: 1px solid var(--rfp-ink-100); text-align: center; font-family: var(--rfp-font-mono); font-size: 11px; color: var(--rfp-ink-300); letter-spacing: .05em;

h2.style: color: var(--rfp-dark); border-left: 4px solid var(--rfp-gold); padding-left: 1rem;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;
margin-top: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; font-size: var(--rfp-fs-sm); color: var(--rfp-ink-500);
margin: 20px 0 16px; padding: 18px 24px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; border-left: 4px solid var(--rfp-gold);
width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--rfp-gold-050); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 2px;

div.div: Define how proposals are scored and ranked

div.style: margin: 0 0 16px; padding: 0; overflow: hidden; border-left: 4px solid var(--rfp-gold);
cursor: pointer; padding: 16px 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rfp-ink-100);

div.p: Define the document types that must be uploaded with the proposals. When no documents are configured, proposals see a single generic file upload.

div.style: margin: 0 0 20px; padding: 14px 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; background: var(--rfp-gold-050); border: 1px solid var(--rfp-gold);

div.span: — Upload proposals received from vendors for AI analysis and scoring.

a.style: font-size: var(--rfp-fs-base); color: var(--rfp-ink-500); text-decoration: none;

div.p: Upload vendor proposals above to start the AI analysis
For: | Submitted:

span.t-attf-class: badge fs-5 bg-{{ 'success' if proposal.status == 'accepted' else ('warning' if proposal.status in ['reviewing', 'shortlisted'] else ('danger' if proposal.status == 'rejected' else 'secondary')) }}

div.p: This proposal was submitted without a file.

i.class: fa fa-cog fa-spin fa-3x text-muted mb-3

div.p:
Our AI is analyzing this proposal against your RFP requirements.
This typically takes 1-2 minutes.
An error occurred during analysis. Please try again later.

h2.t-attf-class: mb-0 text-{{ 'success' if analysis.get('coverage_score', 0) >= 70 else ('warning' if analysis.get('coverage_score', 0) >= 50 else 'danger') }}

h4.t-attf-class: mb-0 text-{{ 'success' if analysis.get('overall_rating') == 'Excellent' else ('primary' if analysis.get('overall_rating') == 'Good' else ('warning' if analysis.get('overall_rating') == 'Fair' else 'danger')) }}
mb-0 text-{{ 'success' if analysis.get('recommendation') == 'Shortlist' else ('warning' if analysis.get('recommendation') == 'Review' else 'danger') }}

span.t-attf-class: badge bg-{{ 'success' if item.get('impact') == 'High' else ('warning' if item.get('impact') == 'Medium' else 'secondary') }} ms-1
badge bg-{{ 'danger' if item.get('severity') == 'Critical' else ('warning' if item.get('severity') == 'Major' else 'secondary') }} ms-1

div.t-attf-class: alert-{{ 'success' if analysis.get('risk_assessment', {}).get('level') == 'Low' else ('warning' if analysis.get('risk_assessment', {}).get('level') == 'Medium' else 'danger') }}

div.p: AI analysis requires a proposal document.

div.span: — Tell us what matters most when evaluating proposals

t.div: Help us understand your evaluation priorities so we can create a tailored scoring rubric.

div.p: Generating your evaluation criteria...

div.style: padding-top: 0; padding-bottom: 0; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap;

div.p: Define how vendor proposals will be scored. Weights must sum to exactly 100%.

div.style: display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap;
padding: 14px 18px; margin-bottom: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;
padding: 20px 24px; margin-bottom: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px;

display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: var(--rfp-font-mono); font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .12em; color: var(--rfp-ink-500); margin-bottom: 4px;

span.style: font-size: 15px; color: var(--rfp-ink-500); display: block; margin-top: 4px;

div.style: display: flex; height: 14px; border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--rfp-ink-100);

div.t-attf-style: width: #{c.weight}%; background: #{_palette[c_index % len(_palette)]}; opacity: #{0.95 if c.weight else 0};

div.style: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; font-size: 11px; font-family: var(--rfp-font-mono); color: var(--rfp-ink-500); margin-top: 6px; gap: 10px;
padding: 18px 24px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 1fr) 240px 90px 36px; gap: 20px; align-items: center;

input.style: font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; color: var(--rfp-ink); min-width: 0; flex: 1; padding: 6px 0; border: 0; background: transparent; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; transition: border-color var(--rfp-t-fast);

div.style: font-family: var(--rfp-font-mono); font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; text-align: right;

button.style: width: 100%; padding: 14px; border-style: dashed; font-size: 13px; margin-top: 6px;

div.class: mx-auto mb-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle

div.p: Upload proposal documents for AI analysis and scoring

div.class: alert alert-warning d-flex align-items-start mb-3 py-2 px-3

div.small: No evaluation criteria set up yet
Define scoring criteria to let AI evaluate and rank proposals automatically.

i.class: fa fa-spinner fa-spin fa-3x text-rfp-gold mb-3

div.p: Our AI is extracting vendor info and scoring the proposal. This may take 1-2 minutes.
